name: Summer Couscous Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/2 small Romaine lettuce head (washed and drained)
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour 1/2 cup water into a medium-size non-stick skillet. Add onion and sauté over medium heat for 10 minutes. Add more water if the onion becomes too dry.
2. Bring 3/4 cup water to a boil in a saucepan, then remove from heat. Add couscous. Cover and let sit for 5 minutes.
3. Add carrots to the skillet with onion and cook for an additional 5 minutes.
4. Add zucchini and garlic to the skillet and cook for another 5 minutes.
5. Fluff the couscous with a fork using a separate bowl.
6. Add the onion mixture, raisins, and chickpeas to the couscous and toss well.
7. Mix together orange juice, olive oil, cayenne pepper, and cinnamon in a small bowl.
8. Add this mixture to the couscous and toss well.
9. Add salt and pepper to taste.
10. Toss tomatoes and mint together.
11. To serve, arrange lettuce leaves on a serving platter or individual plates. Spoon the salad onto the lettuce. Sprinkle tomatoes and mint over the couscous salad.
12. Warm pita bread in the toaster oven for 2 minutes, or heat in the oven for a few more minutes.
